commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch decodes percent escapes in remote media URL fallback basenames, preserves malformed escapes, adds focused saveRemoteMedia coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus a read-only Node probe show current main preserves My%20Report.pdf because URL.pathname is passed directly to basenameFromAnyPath, and the same probe shows the PR truncates encoded separator cases.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can update the helper and add separator regressions; the PR's real-behavior proof gate is now satisfied.

target.title: fix(media): decode remote URL fallback filenames
target.body:
## Summary

- Decode valid percent escapes in URL path basenames before using them as remote media fallback filenames.
- Keep malformed percent-escaped basenames as raw text instead of throwing.
- Add focused `saveRemoteMedia` regression coverage and an Unreleased changelog entry.

Fixes #84050.

## Real behavior proof

After-fix evidence from the PR checkout at `e4458983c4ac1975c911ba58a917e2cd851b5f3e`.

Command:

```sh
node --import tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-84052-proof.mjs
```

The proof script starts a local HTTP server, serves `/files/My%20Report.pdf` without a `Content-Disposition` filename, and calls the real `saveRemoteMedia` source-runtime path. It uses an isolated `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and allows only the local private-network fetch needed for the proof.

Output:

```json
{
  "setup": "local HTTP server + real saveRemoteMedia source runtime",
  "url": "http://127.0.0.1:52710/files/My%20Report.pdf",
  "fileName": "My Report.pdf",
  "contentType": "application/pdf",
  "size": 21,
  "storedPathBasename": "f9692f64-3891-499a-8caa-78a4b4d9d406.pdf",
  "storedBytesMatch": true,
  "stateDir": "/var/folders/qg/ftvdj43s1b79kv3g92r9yzsm0000gn/T/openclaw-84052-proof-InW3KZ"
}
```

## Tests

- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/media/fetch.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/media/fetch.ts src/media/fetch.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `git merge-tree --write-tree HEAD origin/main`
